build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod=false && pnpm --filter @crm/database generate && pnpm --filter @crm/contracts build && pnpm --filter @crm/database build && pnpm --filter @crm/api build

deploy.startCommand: pnpm --filter @crm/database migrate && SEED_PASSWORD=orbit123 pnpm --filter @crm/database seed && pnpm --filter @crm/api start
